title: Sugar Forces the Plan to Collapse
description: Pages 1–5 focus on sugar forces the plan to collapse, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Sugar, Trebol, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as trebol and Sugar overwhelm the Tontatta and push Usopp into a terrifying decision point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Under- Ground: Inside the officers' tower.

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: With this Tata- Babasco as "The World's Spiciest Grape"!!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: We're gonna knock you out, sugar!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He may be able to shoot down a fly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Under- Ground Commerce Port: The Smile Fac- Tory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: No new workers for a year now, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I heard they haven't even shown up at the Royal Palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Which one of you is slacking off!!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Man-made Devil Fruit Production: Smile Factory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: They must find it strange that 500 of their comrades never re- turned... no?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: yeah, but they're just way too naive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: These idiotic... no, rather, "innocent" tomatoes....!! Hehe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: If we're not getting any more of them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Then we'll just have to work the 500 we've got down to the bone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: These haven't completely turned into smiles!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I thought you tomatoes could grow any plant!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Please let my little brother rest a bit....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Today's nations were kind of spoiled.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Don't you lot want to cure your princess, manshelly, of her illness!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Then just keep ma- King those smiles!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: They're the only medicine in the world that can save your princess.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: We're still only able to use one-tenth of the fruits from a given crop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Get Creative and Raise Your Pro- Auction Level!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Won't you let us see Princess Manshelly?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: No, you mustn't!! You'd be sure to catch her strange disease as well....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: ...and we'd be so sad....!! You tomatoes are our precious partners!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Please take care of the princess in the meantime....!! ... *cough*...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: they fell for it, hook, line, and sinker.

summary: Sugar Forces the Plan to Collapse focuses on Unknown person #1, Sugar, Trebol, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as trebol and Sugar overwhelm the Tontatta and push Usopp into a terrifying decision point.
